ORDER - STIPULATION AND ORDER FOR MOTION(S) TO BE HEARD BY A MEMBER OF THE CALIFORNIA BAR SERVING AS A TEMPORARY JUDGE

DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, FEB-17-2022 HEARING HELD RE: PETITIONER AND REAL PARTY IN INTEREST'S PETITION FOR ORDER COMPELLING COMPLIANCE WITH INVESTIGATIVE INTERROGATORIES. THE COURT RULES AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER/REAL PARTY IN INTEREST'S MOTION IS GRANTED. RESPONDENT IS TO PROVIDE FULL NAME, LAST KNOWN ADDRESS, AND TELEPHONE NUMBER. COUNSEL FOR PETITIONER/REAL PARTY IN INTEREST IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER AND E-MAIL IT TO THE PRO TEM JUDGE AT WILLIAMCLYNN@GMAIL.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: KELLY FARRELL, CSR NO. 8081, EMAIL: REPORTERKELLY@GMAIL.COM, TEL: 760-249-8049 (302/JPT)

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE FEB-09-2022 HEARING RE: REAL PARTY IN INTEREST WILLIAM PRASIFKA, EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR'S PETITION FOR ORDER COMPELLING COMPLIANCE WITH INVESTIGATIVE INTERROGATORIES, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order Compelling Compliance With Investigative Interrogatories
Off Calendar Feb-17-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. CAITLIN ROSS, Esq. of California Attorney General's Office (Tel: 415-510-3615) for Petitioner and Real Party in Interest;
Atty. THOMAS E. STILL, Esq. of Hinshaw, Marsh, Still & Hinshaw, LLP (Tel: 408-861-6500) for Respondent The Permanente Medical Group.

Hearing Re: Petitioner and Real Party in Interest's Petition For Order Compelling Compliance With Investigative Interrogatories.

Parties stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for parties (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court rules as follows: Petitioner/Real Party in Interest's motion is granted. Respondent is to provide full name, last known address, and telephone number.

Counsel for Petitioner/Real Party in Interest is to prepare a proposed order and e-mail it to the pro tem judge at williamclynn@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Kelly Farrell, CSR No. 8081, Email: reporterkelly@gmail.com, Tel: 760-249-8049 (302/JPT)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order Compelling Compliance With Investigative Interrogatories
Off Calendar Feb-09-2022 Continued To Feb-17-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: REAL PARTY IN INTEREST WILLIAM PRASIFKA, EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR's Petition For Order Compelling Compliance With Investigative Interrogatories.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is transferred to be heard on the discovery calendar at 9:00 a.m. (room 301) on February 17, 2022.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
